zh.lifeSummary: 當Helenisa De Insula於1249年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾瑟賽時，她的父親William De Insula27歲，母親Beatrice de Corneilles24歲。她與Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Insula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Insua, meaning ‘island, peninsula (of a river or of the sea), land by a river’, from Latin insula ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Helenisa De Insula was born in 1249, in Sessay, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William De Insula, was 27 and her mother, Beatrice de Corneilles, was 24. She married Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helenisa De Insula est née en 1249, à Sessay, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Insula, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Corneilles, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils.

ja.lifeSummary: Helenisa De Insulaが1249年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアセッサイで生まれた時，父William De Insulaは27歳，母Beatrice de Corneillesは24歳であった。Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Helenisa De Insula(이)가 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 세지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William De Insula(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Corneilles(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helenisa De Insula родилась в 1249 г. в местности сессеи, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William De Insula было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Corneilles, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Marmaduke de Darrell of Sessay. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.
